site.main_title: Li Zhang | Java Backend Developer Resume | Spring Boot | Germany
site.ats_title: Li Zhang | ATS Resume | Java Backend Developer | Germany

summary: Java Backend Developer with 4.5 years of experience in high-concurrency logistics and parcel fulfillment systems. Strong background in Java, Spring Boot, Kafka, MySQL, Redis, RESTful APIs, asynchronous processing, and production troubleshooting. Experienced in supporting backend services within a high-traffic logistics platform, where core APIs handled up to 5,000 QPS and over 100 million daily operation requests during promotional peaks.

education.subtitle: MSc in Computer Science
education.note: Relevant coursework: Object-Oriented Programming with Java, Software Engineering, Databases, Computer Architecture.

education.subtitle: BEng in Communication Engineering
education.note: Engineering foundation in communication systems, computer fundamentals, mathematics, and problem-solving.

skills.label: Backend Development
skills.value: Java, Spring Boot, RESTful APIs, Dubbo/RPC, MyBatis

skills.value: MySQL, Redis, Elasticsearch, Kafka, SQL, transactions, indexing, async processing, idempotency

experience.tech_stack: Tech Stack: Java, Spring Boot, Dubbo RPC, Kafka, MySQL, MyBatis, Redis, Elasticsearch, Kubernetes, Kibana
experience.note: Worked on a high-concurrency logistics fulfillment system covering parcel inbound/outbound workflows, status transitions, and asynchronous downstream notifications.

bullets.label: Backend
bullets.text: Developed Java/Spring Boot/Dubbo RPC backend services for logistics fulfillment, including core APIs, status transitions, and asynchronous workflows.

bullets.label: Scale
bullets.text: Supported backend services within a high-traffic logistics platform during promotional peaks, where core APIs handled up to 5,000 QPS and over 100 million daily operation requests.

bullets.label: Messaging
bullets.text: Implemented Kafka-based asynchronous messaging to decouple core services from downstream systems such as logistics, e-commerce, SMS, and voice notification services.

bullets.label: Reliability
bullets.text: Improved system reliability through idempotency design, retry handling, exception recovery, and delayed message handling.

bullets.label: Data & Performance
bullets.text: Used MySQL, MyBatis, Redis, and Elasticsearch for data persistence, caching, search, consistency handling, and database load reduction.

bullets.label: Operations
bullets.text: Used Kibana for production troubleshooting and supported Kubernetes releases, canary deployments, and KMS-based sensitive data encryption.

experience.organization: Guangzhou Huizhi Communication Technology Co., Ltd.

bullets.label: Summary
bullets.text: Supported telecommunications projects through technical solution support, bidding documentation, and customer communication, building strong requirement analysis and cross-functional collaboration skills.

project.note: Took a planned career break after leaving Pinduoduo, including travel, relocation preparation, and focused backend engineering refresh for the German job market.

bullets.label: Project
bullets.text: Built Parcel-Hub-Platform, a Java 21 / Spring Boot logistics backend project covering parcel inbound/outbound workflows, user authentication, parcel status transitions, and event publishing.

bullets.label: Engineering Focus
bullets.text: Practiced Kafka-based asynchronous messaging, Transactional Outbox, PostgreSQL, Redis, Spring Security JWT, integration testing with Testcontainers, and CI workflows with GitHub Actions.
